title: CVNT
full_description: No more good girl. An unhinged, hilarious and interactive exploration of everything CVNT, led by a giant, sexy vulva. Is the worst word in English really c*nt? Or is it can't? Half comedy, half unhinged therapy for the cvnt inside you who desperately wants to unleash.
ai_summary: Sophie Power — dressed as a giant vulva — blends bouffon clowning, interactive party games, and adult confessions in an anarchic hour about bodily shame, permission, and the reclamation of the most censored word in English. Winner of Best Comedy at Melbourne Fringe 2024.
